name: Bob's Burial
blurb: Bob spends his days grazing in the cow pen near Castle Mud.

stages.description: While butchering a cow, you hear a woman screaming in the nearby village. She says a lunatic killed Bob, the village's beloved cow.
Robert told me a farmer southwest of the village saw Bob get killed and drew a sketch of the killer.
I have the suspect sketch. I should throw it into a well before anyone sees it.

name: Bad Blood
blurb: Farmer Borin's cattle are being killed and drained of blood.

stages.description: I should investigate the dead cattle by the old barn.
I found Sela, a young vampire, in the barn. She was turned and abandoned by Lord Mortrek. I need to decide how to handle this.
I need to confront Lord Mortrek in his castle.

values.1: I'm going to break Sela's curse. I must confront Lord Mortrek in his castle.
values.2: Sela and I are going to the castle to get Lord Mortrek's power.

stages.description: I'm facing Lord Mortrek in his castle.

values.1: I'm facing Lord Mortrek in his castle. I need to defeat him to break Sela's curse.
values.2: Lord Mortrek wants the prisoner's heart from the cells below before he gives me the dark blood.

stages.description: I should return to Farmer Borin.

values.1: Mortrek is defeated and Sela is free. I should tell Farmer Borin.
values.2: Mortrek gave me the dark blood. Nothing left for me at Borin's farm.
